_comment: CEFR Listening Import — POST /api/import/cefr/ with type: listening
title: B1 Listening Practice 1

section.title: A phone conversation about a job interview
section.transcript:
A: Hello, can I speak to [1]?
B: Speaking. What's this about?
A: I'm calling about your [2] application.
B: Oh yes, when is the interview?
A: It's on [3] at [4] o'clock.
B: Great. What should I [5]?
section._comment_transcript: Use [1], [2], [N] markers to show where each answer appears in the audio.

questions._comment_type: Gap Fill — text with ___ blank, correct_answer fills it. No choices needed.
questions.content: The caller asks to speak to ___.
questions.explanation: The name is mentioned at the start of the recording.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 1-3: Complete the notes. NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.content: The call is about a ___ application.

questions._comment_type: Multiple Choice — correct_answer is the option letter: A, B or C
questions.explanation: The caller is confirming an interview date.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 3-4: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions._comment_type: Table/Form Completion — fill in a table cell. No choices needed.
questions.explanation: Monday is stated clearly in the conversation.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 4-5: Complete the booking form. ONE WORD.

questions._comment_type: Multiple Select — correct_answer: pipe-separated e.g. A|C, max_selections = how many
questions.content: Which TWO things does the caller tell the candidate to bring?

questions._comment_type: Short Answer — answer from listening, usually 1-3 words. No choices needed.
questions.content: What does the interviewer ask the candidate to bring?
